rationale: Educ. Code §12.012 governs which Education Code provisions apply to home-rule school districts. The proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption change is not an Education Code provision and is not addressed by this section.
quote: A home-rule school district is subject to federal and state laws and rules governing school districts
_note: No direct conflict; §12.012 addresses applicability of Education Code provisions to home-rule districts, not Tax Code homestead exemptions.
